allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/links -F name=GitHub -F url=https://github.com -F 'description=The world'\\''s largest code host')
Bash(curl -s -X PUT http://localhost:3000/api/links/1 -F 'name=GitHub Updated' -F url=https://github.com -F 'description=Updated description')
Bash(curl -s -X PUT http://localhost:3000/api/links/2 -F name=YouTube -F url=https://youtube.com -F 'description=Video streaming platform')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/links -F name=GitHub -F url=https://github.com -F 'description=Code hosting' -F group_id=1)
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/links -F name=YouTube -F url=https://youtube.com -F 'description=Video streaming' -F group_id=2)
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/links -F 'name=Hacker News' -F url=https://news.ycombinator.com -F 'description=Tech news and discussion')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/links -F 'name=MDN Web Docs' -F url=https://developer.mozilla.org -F group_id=1)
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/links -H 'X-Admin-Token: __TRACKED_VAR__' -F name=Apple -F url=https://apple.com -F 'description=Designed by Apple in California')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} links OK'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} groups OK'\)")
